result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 9:     AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
    AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM hist WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.cases_handled DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
